# Greedy Algorithms

Run code: "python cache_simulator.py [test file name]"

Example: "python cache_simulator.py examples/example.in"

Example input: [examples/example.in](examples/example.in)
* Example input file, this is how input file .txts should be formatted in the inputs folder.

Example output: [examples/example.out](examples/example.out)
* To reproduce this format: An output file of this format will be generated by cache_simulator.py to cache_simulator.out. Run `python cache_simulator.py examples/example.in` to reproduce the exact content of examples/example.out.

Assumptions:
* Number of requests will equal m (second input)
* Number of requests will not be prohibitively large

Answer File: ["Project_2.pdf"](./Project_2.pdf)
